v1_initial.name: Initial Test Prompt
v1_initial.prompt: Tall elegant blond Dutch man, age 28-32, refined Italian style tailoring, standing confidently with full body visible. Sharp symmetrical features, clean-shaven, healthy glowing skin. Relaxed yet confident pose. Soft out-of-focus Italian city street background inspired by Milan fashion district, warm natural daylight, gentle shadows. Studio-quality lighting, perfect exposure, professional fashion editorial style, Vogue magazine cover quality.
v1_initial.notes: Do NOT use brand names - they appear as watermarks

v2_no_brand.name: No Brand Names
v2_no_brand.deprecation_reason: Aspect ratio 9:16 caused bad camera angle
v2_no_brand.prompt: Full body shot from head to feet including shoes. Tall elegant blond Dutch man, age 28-32, refined Italian style tailoring, standing confidently. The entire body must be visible - head, torso, legs, and polished dress shoes. Sharp symmetrical features, clean-shaven, healthy glowing skin. Relaxed yet confident pose, one hand slightly in pocket. Soft out-of-focus Milan fashion district background, warm natural daylight, gentle shadows. Studio-quality lighting, perfect exposure, professional fashion editorial photography, high-end catalog quality. Full length portrait, do not crop any body parts.
v2_no_brand.notes: 9:16 aspect ratio caused overhead camera angle - too narrow

v3_production.name: Production Ready
v3_production.prompt: Tall elegant blond Dutch man, age 28-32, refined Italian style tailoring, standing confidently with full body visible. Sharp symmetrical features, clean-shaven, healthy glowing skin. Relaxed yet confident pose. Soft out-of-focus Italian city street background inspired by Milan fashion district, warm natural daylight, gentle shadows. Studio-quality lighting, perfect exposure, professional fashion editorial photography, high-end catalog quality.
v3_production.notes: APPROVED - 4:5 optimal for mobile, Meta Ads, website. No brand watermarks.

learnings.lesson: Windows PowerShell/CMD cannot print emojis - use ASCII characters only in print statements to avoid UnicodeEncodeError (cp1252 codec)
face_reference feature causes high credit consumption - disable unless specifically needed for face consistency
Never use brand names (Vogue, GQ, etc.) in prompts - they appear as watermarks
9:16 aspect ratio causes overhead camera angles - avoid for full body shots
4:5 aspect ratio is optimal for mobile-first, works on Meta Ads and website
Use 'product-to-model' endpoint, NOT 'tryon' for product photography
